questionHtml:
Let Y be the number of actions until the first boost occurs.

Explain why Y≤5.
markschemeHtml:
after four actions that are not boosted, the probability that the next action is boosted is 1 (and p=1 is a certainty)          R1

 

Note: Accept “when Y=5, the probability of a boost is 1”.

Do not accept “on the 5th action the probability of a boost is 1”, unless there is reference to the previous actions being not boosted.

[1 mark]

meta.title: Explain why Y≤5.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 4.6—Combined, mutually exclusive, conditional, independence, prob diagrams
